title: Savory Tunisian Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Tunisia, made with tender cabbage and a blend of savory spices.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add 1 tsp of ground savory and 1 tsp of ground spiced. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add 1 medium chopped red cabbage and cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
Season with 1 tsp of ground tunisian and adjust to taste.
Optional: Add some crusty bread on the side for a filling meal.
